name: codex-obsidian-plugin
description: Connect Codex to a local Obsidian vault through the Obsidian Local REST API MCP endpoint.

interface.shortDescription: Read and write your local Obsidian knowledge base from Codex.
interface.longDescription: Connects Codex to a local Obsidian vault through the Obsidian Local REST API plugin and its MCP endpoint. Use it to search notes, read Markdown files, append captures, and make careful targeted edits.
defaultPrompt: Search my Obsidian vault for notes about this topic.
Save this as a new note in my Obsidian inbox.
Update the relevant project note in Obsidian.
